docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $814.88 FILED BY CONTE, ANDREA AS TO DEFENDANT HARRISON, CHRISTINA "LALA" ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-21-2025 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $75.00 SERVED MAR-29-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HARRISON, CHRISTINA "LALA"

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-21-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-19-2025 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ANDREA CONTE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHRISTINA "LALA" HARRISON IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ANDREA CONTE IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHRISTINA "LALA" HARRISON IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
